channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KALPATPOWR] Kalpataru Projects International Ltd Receives ESG Rating of 66.7 for FY 2025 from SES ESG Research
item.description:
Kalpataru Projects International Ltd has been assigned an Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) rating of 66.7 for the financial year 2025 by SES ESG Research Private Limited. The rating was assigned based on publicly available information, as the company did not engage SES ESG for the rating. The company has been informed about the rating via an email received on 30th March, 2026.

  • Kalpataru Projects International Ltd receives ESG rating of 66.7 for FY 2025
  • Rating assigned by SES ESG Research Private Limited
  • Assigned based on publicly available information
  • Company did not engage SES ESG for the rating
  • Information communicated via email on 30th March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KALPATARU POWER TRANSMISSION LTD. | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [NORTHARC] Northern Arc Capital Ltd: Ms. Kshama Fernandes Retires as Non-executive Non-independent Director
item.description:
Northern Arc Capital Ltd announced the retirement of Ms. Kshama Fernandes as the Non-executive Non-independent Director due to completion of her tenure. She ceased to be a Director of the Company with effect from the close of business hours on March 31, 2026. The Board and Management of the Company expressed their gratitude for her valuable contribution and guidance during her association with the Company.

  • Ms. Kshama Fernandes has completed her tenure as a Non-Executive Non-Independent Director of Northern Arc Capital Ltd.
  • She will cease to be a Director of the Company with effect from the close of business hours on March 31, 2026.
  • The Company expressed gratitude for her valuable contribution and guidance during her tenure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Northern Arc Capital Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SOLARINDS] Solar Industries India Ltd Appoints Shri Kirit Ramesh Kamdar as Additional Independent Director
item.description:
Solar Industries India Ltd has appointed Shri Kirit Ramesh Kamdar as an Additional Director (Independent Director; Category: Non-Executive) for a term of 5 years, effective from April 01, 2026. Mr. Kamdar is a qualified Chartered Accountant and Cost & Management Accountant with around 35+ years of experience in Tax advisory and Financial Management. He was previously associated with a member firm of Ernst & Young from the year 2008 till 2023 and specializes in corporate tax, litigation and direct tax advisory across industries. He is a member of the Bombay Chartered Accountants Society’s Direct Tax Committee and has strong expertise in audit support, corporate governance, risk assessment and corporate advisory. Mr. Kamdar is not related to any of the Directors of the Company and is not debarred from holding the office of Director by virtue of any order passed by SEBI or any other such authority.

  • Solar Industries India Ltd appoints Shri Kirit Ramesh Kamdar as Additional Director
  • Mr. Kamdar is a qualified Chartered Accountant and Cost & Management Accountant
  • He has around 35+ years of experience in Tax advisory and Financial Management
  • Mr. Kamdar is a member of the Bombay Chartered Accountants Society’s Direct Tax Committee
  • His appointment is subject to the approval of shareholders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOLAR INDUSTRIES INDIA LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [RKFORGE] Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd. Commences Commercial Production of Horizontal Casting Line with 28,800 MT Capacity
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd. has announced the commencement of commercial production of a new Horizontal Casting Line, 'DISA FLEX 80', at its manufacturing facility in Jharkhand. The casting line, which has a production capacity of 28,800 metric tonnes per annum, is capable of manufacturing casting products as per quality standards and customer requirements. The investment for this new capacity addition is Rs. 249.00 Crores, which is being financed through a mix of debt and internal accruals.

  • Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd. commences commercial production of Horizontal Casting Line with 28,800 MT capacity.
  • The new casting line, 'DISA FLEX 80', is capable of manufacturing casting products as per quality standards and customer requirements.
  • The investment for this new capacity addition is Rs. 249.00 Crores.
  • The proposed capacity is being added through a mix of debt and internal accruals.
  • The company aims to expand in the automotive casting space to provide a complete bouquet of products in the automotive space.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAMKRISHNA FORGINGS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [PHOENXINTL] Phoenix International Ltd Closes Trading Window Until 48 Hours After Q4 and FY26 Results
item.description:
Phoenix International Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading. The closure will be effective from April 1, 2026, and will continue till 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended on 31.03.2026. During this period, all designated persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to deal in the company's securities. The date of the board meeting to approve the audited financial results will be informed in due course.

  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after Q4 and FY26 results
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI regulations and company's Code of Conduct
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives advised not to deal in company's securities during closure
  • Date of board meeting to approve audited financial results to be informed later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PHOENIX INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CUBEINVIT] Cube Highways Trust: Sponsor Group Reduces Ordinary Unit Holding by 20.81%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cube Highways Trust has disclosed a material issue where Cube Highways and Infrastructure III Pte. Ltd., a member of the sponsor group, has sold 20.81% of its ordinary units. The sale was executed on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited for a total value of INR 43,07,00,000. This disclosure is in accordance with the Policy on unpublished price sensitive information and dealing in securities by the parties to Cube Highways Trust.

  • Cube Highways and Infrastructure III Pte. Ltd., a member of the sponsor group, sold 20.81% of its ordinary units.
  • The sale was executed on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.
  • The total value of the sale was INR 43,07,00,000.
  • This disclosure is in accordance with the Policy on unpublished price sensitive information and dealing in securities by the parties to Cube Highways Trust.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cube Highways Trust | Category: Sale

item.title: [KAYNES] Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi Inaugurates Kaynes Semicon Private Limited's Plant at Sanand GIDC, Ahmedabad
item.description:
Kaynes Technology India Ltd has announced the inauguration of the Sanand Plant of its wholly owned subsidiary, Kaynes Semicon Private Limited, by the Honorable Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi. The inauguration took place at the Sanand GIDC, Ahmedabad, in accordance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The report includes a few snapshots of the inauguration for reference.

  • Inauguration of Kaynes Semicon Private Limited's Plant by Honorable Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi
  • Inauguration at Sanand GIDC, Ahmedabad
  • Compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
  • Wholly owned subsidiary of Kaynes Technology India Ltd

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kaynes Technology India Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [CUPID] Cupid Limited Set to Deliver Strongest Quarter in Its History, Surpassing Annual Guidance
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cupid Limited, a leading manufacturer of condoms, personal lubricants, and FMCG products, has announced its strongest quarterly performance to date. The company is set to surpass its FY26 annual guidance of ₹335 Cr in revenue and ₹100 Cr in net profit. For FY27, Cupid Limited is expecting revenue of at least ₹600 Cr and a net profit margin of over 30%. The company is supported by adequate raw material inventory, a favourable currency environment, and strong export growth. The detailed financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026 will be announced following approval by the Board of Directors.

  • Cupid Limited reports its strongest quarterly performance in the company's history
  • Company set to surpass FY26 annual guidance of ₹335 Cr in revenue and ₹100 Cr in net profit
  • Expectations of achieving ₹600 Cr in revenue and over 30% net profit margin in FY27
  • Supported by adequate raw material inventory, favourable currency environment, and strong export growth
  • Detailed financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026 to be announced following Board approval

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CUPID LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [EMIL] Electronics Mart India Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons Until 48 Hours After Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Electronics Mart India Limited has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives, as per the company's Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor, and Report Trading by Insiders and Designated Persons. The trading window will remain closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026. The board meeting date to consider the company's audited financial results will be informed in due course.

  • Electronics Mart India Ltd closes trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives.
  • Trading window to remain closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after Q4 results declaration in 2026.
  • Closure in accordance with the company's Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor, and Report Trading by Insiders and Designated Persons.
  • Board meeting date to consider the company's audited financial results to be informed later.
  • The announcement is made to keep stakeholders informed and for record purposes.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Electronics Mart India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NETWORK18] Network 18 Media & Investments Ltd: CEO - Broadcast & Publishing, Avinash Kaul, Resigns
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Network 18 Media & Investments Ltd announced the resignation of its CEO - Broadcast & Publishing, Mr. Avinash Kaul. Mr. Kaul has resigned to pursue professional and personal goals outside the organization. His last working day will be 31st March 2026. Mr. Kaul expressed his gratitude to the leadership team and all his colleagues at Network18 for their support and making his journey enjoyable.

  • Network 18 Media & Investments Ltd announces the resignation of CEO - Broadcast & Publishing, Avinash Kaul.
  • Mr. Kaul has resigned to pursue professional and personal goals outside the organization.
  • His last working day will be 31st March 2026.
  • Mr. Kaul expressed gratitude to the Network18 leadership team and colleagues.
  • Network18 Media & Investments Ltd is a well-known media and investment company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NETWORK18 MEDIA & INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Management Change
